# Quivers
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Quivers&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom daggers and old daggers that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Quiver
!Damage
!Range
!Shots
!Stats
!MP
Cost
!Cooldown
!Effect
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effect
|-
|Stardust Quiver
|345-420
|15
|
|<nowiki>+3vit</nowiki>
+3wis

+5dex
|100
|
|Paralyzed: 4 sec
|yes
|
|yes
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Quiver of the Asgard Ruins
|180-420
|12.5
|
|<nowiki>+5vit</nowiki>
|175
|
|Stunned:
3.5 sec 
|
|
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Leviathan's 
Repentance 
|145-165
|15
|
|<nowiki>+5spd</nowiki>
+7dex
|70
|2.25 sec
|Paralyzed:
4.5 sec
|yes
|yes
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Lightning God Quiver
|250-335
|15
|
|<nowiki>+2dex</nowiki>
+2att
|60
|2 sec
|Stunned:
1.5 sec
|
|
|yes
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|The Split Arrow
|320-380
|15
|2
|<nowiki>+2att</nowiki>
+2dex
|100
|
|Cursed:
5 sec 
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Odin's Ravens
|500-1000
|20
|
|<nowiki>-3def</nowiki>
+3att
|160
|4 sec
|Berserk: 2.5 sec
Slowed: 

3.6

Dazed:

3.6
|yes
|
|yes
|7%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Quiver of Thunder
|310-360
|15
|
|<nowiki>+5att</nowiki>
|100
|6 sec
|Dazed:
4 sec

Paralyzed:

3 sec
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Beehemoth Quiver
|180-260
|9.6
|3
|<nowiki>+3att</nowiki>
+3dex
|90
|
|Slowed:
5 sec
|yes
|
|yes
|5%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Quiver of Shadows
|400-500
|10
|5
|<nowiki>+2def</nowiki>
-2spd
|90
|
|
|yes
|yes
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|}
